description: Style Note tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs, fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims, a monochrome top (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Pink and black printed shrug, has ruffles all over, black piping and an open placketMaterial and Care 95% polyester, 5% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
